no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: TD-032-agentmetrics-rollup.md already contains the requested trigger threshold, schema, and invalidation strategy, but the required repo-wide `ddx doc audit` is not clean in this worktree because of preexisting document-graph failures unrelated to this bead. Current audit output reports a cycle in the FEAT-002/FEAT-008/FEAT-013/FEAT-014/FEAT-020/SD-013/SD-019 chain, 84 duplicate document-id entries across the repo, and one missing dependency (`helix.workflow.principles -> helix.workflow`). Fixing that baseline drift would require a separate, broad docs cleanup outside the scope of this bead.
